channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Old worktop fly tipped on grass verge, 15th April
item.description:
Sections of cut up kitchen worktop have been fly tipped on the grass verge on Grovefield way. The are located next to the crossing point between Arle Court Transport hub and the B&Q site on the same side as the Transport Hub.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatherley Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 15th April
item.description:
Cway pothole Stat plan required 600mmx500mmx41mm Road closure TM required 1nsd (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: LArge area of damaged tarmac, 15th April
item.description:
Heading TOWARDS cheltenham. About 100 yards after railway. Area of damaged tarmac. Unable to avoid due to narrowness of road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evesham Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 15th April
item.description:
NWD Give and take 15 MINUTES DELAY BOARDS carriage pothole 500x400x30mm number SIZE IS APPROX (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on entrance to King George v playing field, 15th April
item.description:
Pothole on entrance to King George v playing field in the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Saracens RFC, St Mark's, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 15th April
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please relay x1 raised rocking 900x600x20mm slab number 1 (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 15th April
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please relay x1 raised rocking 900x600x20mm slab number 2 (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 15th April
item.description:
Fway abrupt level Stat plan required 540mmx20mm depth Standard TM required with fway closure (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 15th April
item.description:
Please make safe with top soil 1100mmx1300mmx74mm Standard TM with fway closure (FW Over-Riding)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 15th April
item.description:
Install new Give way sign to column number 1 Give and take TM Junction with Wymans Lane (Damaged Traffic Sign)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 15th April
item.description:
Install Temporary A frame Give way sign ENWD Give and take TM Junction with Wymans Lane (Damaged Traffic Sign)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 15th April
item.description:
Give and take 28 day please remove x1 large tree branch now on grass verge approx 6 meters x4 meters (Damaged Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 15th April
item.description:
Cway pothole Stat plan required 409mmx300mmx42mm Road closure TM required 3nsd (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 15th April
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 15th April
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 15th April
item.description:
Cway pothole Stat plan required 400mmx220mmx41mm Road closure TM required 4nsd (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 15th April
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 15th April
item.description:

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 15th April
item.description:
Customer reports that a tree/bush directly outside of the location is out of control and needs to be cut back.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 15th April
item.description:
Fway abrupt level Stat plan required 387mmx502mmx20mm Standard TM required with fway closure (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet
